subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí-Qablí-Akbar! Upon thee be My glory! Thy letter hath been received at the threshold by My Name Mahdí, upon whom rest My loving-kindness and mercy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی قبل اکبر علیک بهائی نامه ات را اسمی مهدی علیه عنایتی و رحمتی بساحت
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @the concourse on high
